title: Congressional Border Security Assessment Act
stage_label: Referred to the House Committee on Natural Resources.
crs_summary: Congressional Border Security Assessment Act This bill grants Members of Congress and their accompanying staff lawful access to Indian reservations for the purpose of assessing national security, public safety, and the security of the border. Specifically, the bill applies to an Indian reservation that includes 50 or more contiguous miles of the U.S.-Mexico border.
last_action_text: Referred to the House Committee on Natural Resources.
